scripts.build: npm --workspace @switchboard/core run build && npm --workspace @switchboard/broker run build && npm --workspace @switchboard/ui run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @switchboard/core run typecheck && npm --workspace @switchboard/broker run typecheck && npm --workspace @switchboard/ui run typecheck
scripts.smoke:operator: npm run build && node scripts/operator-readiness-smoke.mjs example-matrix
scripts.doctor:operator: npm run build && node scripts/operator-readiness-smoke.mjs from-env
scripts.verify:control-plane: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run smoke:broker-parse && node scripts/adapter-boundary-smoke.mjs && node scripts/adapter-conflict-smoke.mjs && node scripts/adapter-status-smoke.mjs && node scripts/adapters-snapshot-smoke.mjs && node scripts/auth-policy-smoke.mjs && node scripts/codex-app-server-diagnostics-smoke.mjs && node scripts/codex-app-server-doctor-smoke.mjs && node scripts/codex-wrapper-smoke.mjs && node scripts/codex-doctor-smoke.mjs && node scripts/dashboard-smoke.mjs && node scripts/doctor-contracts-smoke.mjs && node scripts/error-http-response-smoke.mjs && node scripts/error-response-smoke.mjs && node scripts/failure-response-smoke.mjs && node scripts/health-smoke.mjs && node scripts/local-broker-launch-smoke.mjs && node scripts/mutation-authorization-smoke.mjs && node scripts/operator-readiness-smoke.mjs example-matrix && node scripts/planner-smoke.mjs && node scripts/preflight-contract-smoke.mjs && node scripts/preflight-doctor-smoke.mjs && node scripts/profile-loader-smoke.mjs && node scripts/profile-resolution-smoke.mjs && node scripts/profiles-snapshot-smoke.mjs && node scripts/provider-readiness-smoke.mjs && node scripts/provider-sync-doctor-smoke.mjs && node scripts/request-body-smoke.mjs && node scripts/refresh-smoke.mjs && node scripts/refresh-snapshot-smoke.mjs && node scripts/response-envelope-smoke.mjs && node scripts/route-contract-smoke.mjs && node scripts/runtime-config-smoke.mjs && node scripts/state-snapshot-smoke.mjs && node scripts/state-store-smoke.mjs && node scripts/subscription-sync-smoke.mjs && node scripts/task-snapshot-smoke.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run audit
